content: Language teaching vocabulary acquisition of the term "reflection" (from Topic A's high school English curriculum finding) can be used as a structured scaffolding tool to improve LLM self-reflection mechanism performance, by training LLMs to map their internal self-correction steps to the human meta-cognitive vocabulary of reflection that is already standardized in second-language learning curricula. This human-centered lexical scaffolding helps align LLM self-reflection outputs with interpretable, consistent meta-cognitive steps that humans can review and refine.
